text:
NAME: FICARR 

LONG NAME: FICARR_IDENT_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: XXXXX 

COMMENT: This field comes from the fiscal intermediary number that is present on the first claim record included in 
the stay. 

Different FIs are under contract with CMS at different times. Reference the CMS website for MAC 
Contractors (for example): https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Medicare-Contracting/Medicare-
Administrative-Contractors/Who-are-the- MACs.html 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
